code_dossier.name: UpdatePhoneResponse.java
code_dossier.description: A Data Transfer Object (DTO) class that represents the response structure for phone number update operations in the account management system. It extends BaseResponse to inherit standard response fields like code and message.

data.detailed_description:
UpdatePhoneResponse is a lightweight DTO (Data Transfer Object) class designed to encapsulate the response data for phone number update API operations within the account management module.

**Functional Analysis:**
This class serves as a response wrapper for the "update phone" business operation. By extending BaseResponse, it automatically inherits:
- `code`: A ToBCodeEnum representing the operation result status code
- `message`: A human-readable message describing the operation outcome

The class is intentionally empty (marker class pattern), indicating that the phone update operation only needs to return success/failure status without additional data payload. This is a common pattern for mutation operations where the client only needs confirmation of success.

**Architectural Role:**
- Part of the account-api module, serving as a contract between service layer and API consumers
- Follows the standard response pattern established by BaseResponse across the application
- Positioned in the DTO layer, facilitating data transfer between layers without exposing domain entities

**Design Observations:**
1. The @Data annotation from Lombok is imported but not applied to this class, which is an oversight since BaseResponse uses @Data
2. The class follows the convention of separating request/response DTOs for API operations
3. The empty class body suggests this is designed for extensibility - additional phone-update-specific fields can be added in the future without breaking existing contracts
responsibilities: Encapsulate response data for phone number update API operations
Provide type-safe response wrapper distinguishing phone update responses from other operation responses
Inherit standard response structure (code, message) from BaseResponse for consistency
Serve as an API contract component in the account management module
Enable future extensibility for phone-update-specific response fields

interfaces.name: UpdatePhoneResponse
interfaces.description: DTO class extending BaseResponse for phone update operation responses. Inherits code (ToBCodeEnum) and message (String) fields from parent class.
